commands.review_summary:
The PR reorders Control UI WebChat final and aborted terminal event handling so stream/run state is reconciled before committing assistant messages, and adds regression assertions around that assignment order.

PR surface: Source +5, Tests +30. Total +35 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main appends final/aborted assistant messages while chatStream can still be non-null, and buildChatItems renders a non-null stream separately. I did not run a browser repro in this read-only sweep.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining action is contributor or maintainer real WebChat behavior proof before merge, not an automation-repairable code defect.

target.title: fix #71992: [Bug]: Control UI webchat duplicates every assistant reply on 2026.4.21 — regression from #5964/#39469
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #71992 by clearing active WebChat stream/run state before committing terminal assistant messages.
- Keeps final and aborted fallback text behavior by snapshotting the live stream before lifecycle reconciliation.
- Adds regression assertions that final and aborted terminal commits happen only after `chatStream` has been cleared.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** Control UI WebChat could render a completed assistant reply twice because terminal events committed `chatMessages` while the same reply still existed in `chatStream`.
- **Real environment tested:** Linux worktree `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-71992`; local OpenClaw dev gateway started from the patched worktree on port 19116; Playwright loaded the connected Control UI chat page.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts`; `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`; `git diff --check`; `start_openclaw_dev_gateway.sh` with `OPENCLAW_REPO` pointing at the patched worktree and `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=19116`; `node /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-71992-evidence/control-ui-load-proof.mjs`.
- **Evidence after fix:** `ui-chat-tests.log` shows 2 files and 101 tests passing; `tsgo-test-ui.log` exits 0; `openclaw-start.log` and `openclaw-dev-gateway.log` show the patched runtime reaching `ready`; `control-ui-load-proof.log` shows Playwright reached `http://127.0.0.1:19116/chat?session=main`; `control-ui-chat-connected.png` captures the connected chat page.
- **Observed result after fix:** The terminal event handler clears `chatRunId` and `chatStream` before assigning the final or aborted assistant message, so the renderer no longer has both committed history and a live stream item for the same active run.
- **What was not tested:** The blacksmith `pnpm check:changed` delegation could not run because the local crabbox binary failed its basic sanity check. The local child-mode `check:changed` run reached an unrelated current-main core test type error in `src/channels/message/ingress-queue.test.ts`, outside this UI patch.
- **Fix classification:** Root cause fix

## Regression Test Plan

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/build-chat-items.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `git diff --check`
- Local gateway startup from the patched worktree plus Playwright Control UI chat page load.

## Root Cause

- **Root cause:** The active-run `final` and `aborted` branches appended the terminal assistant message to `chatMessages` before `reconcileTerminalRun` cleared `chatStream`. During Lit's render batching window, the renderer could see the same assistant turn as both committed history and a live stream item.
- **Why this is root-cause fix:** The patch snapshots any needed fallback stream text, runs terminal lifecycle reconciliation first, then commits the terminal assistant message. This removes the simultaneous committed-message/live-stream state without adding broad history dedupe or changing unowned-run handling.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
